Package it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message.response

package it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message.response
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message
     
    it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message.request
     
  • Record Classes
    Class
    Description
    EndGameMessage
    Broadcast message sent when the match ends.
    ErrorMessage
    Error message sent by the server to the single client that caused the issue.
    GameStartedMessage
    Broadcast message sent the moment the match starts.
    GameStateMessage
    Broadcast message with the current match state.
    LobbyStateMessage
    Broadcast message with the updated lobby state.
    MatchAbandonedMessage
    Broadcast sent when a suspended (crash-recovered) match is torn down because one of its players chose to leave instead of reconnecting.
    MatchClosedMessage
    Broadcast message sent when the match is closed abnormally.
    MatchesListMessage
    Server response listing matches that are open and not yet started.
    MatchJoinedMessage
    Confirmation sent to the client after creating or joining a match.
    MatchRecoveringMessage
    Broadcast while a crash-recovered match is waiting for its players to reconnect.
    PingMessage
    Application-level liveness probe sent by the server to the client.
    TotemSelectionMessage
    Broadcast message carrying the current state of the pre-game totem selection phase.
